author: IvanHanloth
description: Adds Previous / Next / SeeAlso navigation to notes via frontmatter properties. Supports floating buttons or VitePress-style inline navigation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: IvanHanloth
manifest.description: Adds Previous / Next / SeeAlso navigation to notes via frontmatter properties. Supports floating buttons or VitePress-style inline navigation.
manifest.name: Article Navigator

name: Article Navigator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: allow auto rename for property keys by @IvanHanloth in https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/pull/5
* fix: fix unable to double click on mobile to navigate by @IvanHanloth in https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/pull/6
* doc: add demo to doc by @IvanHanloth in https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/pull/7
* Implement auto rename for property keys and improve mobile navigation by @IvanHanloth in https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/pull/8
* ci: create auto version bump and release workflow by @IvanHanloth in https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/pull/9
* chor: Create automatic version bump and release workflow by @IvanHanloth in https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/pull/10


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/IvanHanloth/Obsidian-Article-Navigator/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2
releases.name: Article Navigator v1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Article Navigator for Obsidian v1.0.0 released!

Adds Previous / Next / SeeAlso navigation to notes via frontmatter properties. Supports floating buttons or VitePress-style inline navigation. Make it easier to navigate between related notes!
releases.name: Article Navigator v1.0.0
